structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-16 Symmetry Lending HELOC Relaunch
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-16 09:25:40-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Borrowers are increasingly utilizing second-lien products to tap into their home equity while preserving their low first-mortgage rates. Capital Markets is pleased to announce the relaunch of Symmetry Lending, offering competitive HELOC solutions, including standalone and piggyback options. Symmetry distinguishes itself from our existing outlets with its acceptance of manufactured homes and its fast, personalized service. Please see below for additional details. 

Channel: Brokered

Product Type: HELOC

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/ElT5pIKctItJsiIBxShFeH8BEouSBkqt8gJ1QqcvyLRIQw?e=QT5Eub> 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EgrHNU0C_R5MlpKWhpG0DLUBixEikhWWawHXGqVx14c7zQ?e=4M4gre> 

                 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	680+ FICO
*	Up to 89.99% LTV
*	Max DTI 45%
*	Loan amounts up to $1MM
*	Manufactured homes (double-wide, 1976 and newer), PUD, Condos, SFR permitted
*	Primary, second home, and investment

AE CONTACT INFO

Stephen Wilson; 480.512.4532; stephen.wilson@symmetrylending.com <mailto:stephen.wilson@symmetrylending.com> 

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Compensation plan (subject to splits): 2% for standalone, 1% for piggyback
*	Available in AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, DE, FL, IN, KS, MT, NC, NJ, NM, OK, OR, PA, SC, TN, UT, WA, WY

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing
*	Rate sheet

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
